title: ERGSN Product Candidate
description: One product surfaced from a maker's website. Lives in data/product-candidates.json until reviewed; saved candidates are later transformed into data/products.json rows by hand or a follow-up tool.

id.description: Stable slug — sha-1 of makerId + url, truncated to 12 chars.

name.description: Product name as extracted from the page.

url.description: Product detail page URL on the maker's site.

imageUrl.description: Best image URL (hero / thumbnail) discovered for the product.

description.description: Short blurb (≤300 chars) extracted from the page.

priceText.description: Price string verbatim if present (currency mixed).

discoveredFrom.description: The catalog/listing page where this product was found.

status.description: candidate (just discovered) → saved (passed first review) → registered (added to data/products.json) OR discarded.
